baseline_display_name: When To Solve, When To Verify

coverage_policy.notes: Rows are exportable when required datasets pass import validation. This contract is adjacent-only and does not imply direct frontier-control equivalence.

allow: official adjacent import-validated solve-vs-verify baseline rows
fixed-budget SC-vs-GenRM comparative slices under imported artifact contract
forbid: full in-repo faithful reproduction claims for upstream stack
